response.overview: The story follows Badrul, a tour guide who receives mysterious light signals from the forest that disturb his mind and daily activities. This causes Badrul to struggle hard in finding the source of the light and he discovers that it is morse code being sent by someone named Haikal. But why is Haikal sending this morse code? What action does Badrul take in trying to find out the reason behind the presence of these morse code light signals?
response.title: Morse Code Daripada Haikal
